BulkImportModal.importAsCustomConfirmMessage_other: {{count}} items other than matched games will be imported as custom games. Only names and local paths will be saved, without metadata. Continue?

dbBackupPath.pathPlaceholder: Leave empty to use default path

lePath.note: Set the executable file path for LE region switching software, used for region switching when launching games
lePath.title: LE Region Software Path

magpiePath.note: Set the executable file path for Magpie software, used for game screen magnification
magpiePath.title: Magpie Software Path

savePath.moveBackupWarning: Backup path saved, but failed to migrate old backups: {{error}}

Batch.deleteMessage_other: Delete {{count}} selected games? This cannot be undone.

closeDialog.message: Please choose an action: Exit or Minimize to tray?
closeDialog.title: Close Application

runningExitDialog.message_one: {{count}} game is still running. Exiting the app will not close it, but the recorded playtime for this session will be lost. Do you still want to exit?
runningExitDialog.message_other: {{count}} games are still running. Exiting the app will not close them, but the recorded playtime for this session will be lost. Do you still want to exit?
runningExitDialog.title: Exit Reminder

UpdateModal.portableWarning: You are using the portable version, automatic updates may not work properly. It is recommended to click "Manual Update" to go to GitHub and download the latest zip file for replacement.
UpdateModal.title: New Version Available

errors.authFailed: Authentication failed. Please check your credentials or permissions
errors.badRequest: The request parameters are invalid. Please review and try again
errors.bgmRateLimited: Bangumi requests are rate limited. The current task has stopped. Please retry manually after 1 hour
errors.invalidGameId: The game ID format is invalid
errors.invokeFailed: The application command failed. Please try again later

errors.mixedSourcesFailed: All data sources failed to respond
errors.notFound: The requested content was not found

errors.requestRateLimited: Too many requests. Please try again later
errors.responseParseFailed: Failed to parse the response. Please try again later
errors.vndbRateLimited: VNDB requests are too frequent. The retry still failed after a short pause. Please try again later

Collection.deleteGroupMessage: Are you sure you want to delete group "{{name}}"? This will also delete all categories in the group and cannot be undone.

errors.deleteCategoryFailed: Failed to delete category, please try again
errors.deleteGroupFailed: Failed to delete group, please try again

about.author: Author
about.noUpdate: You are already on the latest version

batchUpdate.description: The batch update feature can be used to update BGM/VNDB data for existing games. When game metadata changes, you can use this feature to sync the latest information. Once you click the update button, please wait patiently as the update process may take some time. It is recommended to use when updating game data sources.
batchUpdate.error: Failed to batch update VNDB data: {{message}}
batchUpdate.errorBgm: Failed to batch update BGM data: {{message}}
batchUpdate.noBgmGames: No games with BGM ID found
batchUpdate.noGames: No games with VNDB ID found
batchUpdate.title: Batch Update Data

bgmTokenSettings.loginMethodsHint: Choose either login method. OAuth quick login is recommended.
bgmTokenSettings.profileUnavailable: No user info yet. Try the button below to fetch user info.
bgmTokenSettings.reloginRequired: Bangumi login has expired. Please log in again.

cardClickMode.description: Controls single-click behavior for game cards in the library and collections. Double-click always launches the game.
cardClickMode.navigate: Navigation Mode (Single click to view details)
cardClickMode.select: Selection Mode (Single click to select game)
cardClickMode.title: Card Click Mode

Settings.closeAppDescription: Close the window and end the application process.
Settings.closeSettingsDescription: Choose whether closing the window asks for confirmation and what happens when confirmation is skipped.
Settings.closeToTrayDescription: Keep the application running in the system tray after closing the window.

collectionSync.bgmDescription: Try to read the BGM collection status when adding a game, and sync local status changes back to BGM.
collectionSync.syncFailed: Local status was updated, but failed to sync to {{source}}
collectionSync.title: Collection Sync
collectionSync.vndbDescription: Try to read the VNDB collection status when adding a game, and sync local status changes back to VNDB.

databaseBackup.autoBackupOnExitDescription: When enabled, the database is backed up when the application exits normally. Also backing up custom covers may delay exit.
databaseBackup.autoMinIntervalHelp: Use 0 to back up every time you exit
databaseBackup.importSuccess: Database imported successfully. Custom covers were backed up and cover cache was cleared. The application will restart automatically.
databaseBackup.restoreWarning: Restoring database will overwrite existing data. Custom covers will be backed up first and cover cache will be cleared to avoid cover mismatches. The application will restart automatically after import.
databaseBackup.title: Data Backup and Restore

webdavBackup.title: WebDAV Backup & Restore
webdavBackup.description: Configure WebDAV remote storage for database backup upload and restore.
webdavBackup.configIncomplete: Please fill in URL, username and password
webdavBackup.importSuccess: WebDAV database imported successfully, app will restart

dev.title: Experimental Features
dev.tooltip: The following features are experimental, please use with caution

linuxLaunchCommand.description: Set the command used to launch Windows executable files (.exe) on Linux. Supports wine, proton, or other compatibility-layer commands, and can also be a full path to an executable or script available in PATH.
linuxLaunchCommand.note: Note: You need to restart the game for this setting to take effect.
linuxLaunchCommand.title: Linux Launch Command

logLevel.description: Only effective for the current session, not saved. Used to temporarily adjust the backend log output verbosity.
logLevel.title: Log Settings

mixedSearchSources.description: This setting affects Mixed mode. BGM and VNDB are enabled by default, while other sources can be enabled as needed. You can enable 2-4 sources.
mixedSearchSources.title: Mixed Search Sources

pathSettings.note: Configure paths for game save backups, database backups, LE region software, Magpie software, etc.
pathSettings.title: Path Settings

proxy.description: Enter a proxy address to use it for app network requests, or leave it blank to use system network settings.
proxy.invalidUrl: Enter a valid proxy address starting with http:// or https://
proxy.title: Network Proxy Settings

sections.aboutDescription: View version, update status, documentation, and feedback links.
sections.accountDescription: Manage data source account tokens and collection sync behavior.
sections.dataSourceDescription: Configure search sources, VNDB data handling, and batch data maintenance.
sections.displayDescription: Adjust language, content filtering, and game card interactions.
sections.storageDescription: Configure local paths, and run data backup or restore.
sections.systemDescription: Manage startup, logs, close behavior, and time tracking mode.

Settings.skipCloseRemindDescription: Skip the close confirmation and immediately perform the selected default action.

spoilerLevel.description: Select spoiler level to get appropriate tag content
spoilerLevel.title: TAG Spoiler Level

startupPage.description: The initial page shown the next time the application starts.
startupPage.title: Default Startup Page

tagTranslation.description: Enable Chinese translation for game tags
tagTranslation.title: TAG Translation

timeTrackingMode.description: Select how game time is calculated. Changes apply only to games launched afterward.
timeTrackingMode.elapsedDesc: Counts total time from game launch to exit, regardless of focus
timeTrackingMode.playtimeDesc: Only counts time when the game window is in focus, pauses when switching to other windows
timeTrackingMode.title: Game Time Tracking Mode

vndbTokenSettings.profileUnavailable: Unable to fetch user info with the current VNDB Token. Please check whether the token and permissions are valid.
